'''Retep III''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Retep system/Legends|Retep system]].

[[Habassa]]n [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] called ''[[Starmover]]'' brought foodstuffs near the planet and the freighters ''[[Kielty]]'' were retrieving it when they were attacked by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] ''[[Anjisan]]''; However, Rebel Ace [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] held off the Imperial assault until the transfer was complete.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]'' {{1st}}
